svg.text: GUI (Laptop) ↔ Raspberry Pi (High Level) ↔ ESP32 (Low Level)
Connected via WiFi — ROS2 DDS (CycloneDDS) on same network as Raspberry Pi
LAYER 2 — Raspberry Pi 4 | High Level | ROS2 Jazzy
All nodes run on RPi — communicate via ROS2 topics (localhost)
UART Serial2 | GPIO16(RX) GPIO17(TX) | 115200 baud | 8-N-1 | 3.3V TTL
P x y yaw Go to position (AUTO)
D F/B/L/R/S Direction command (MANUAL) — velocities stored on ESP32
CAM_NEXT Frame captured, move camera to next angle
M MANUAL/AUTO/S/R Mode switch / Emergency stop / Reset odometry
O x y yaw Current pose at 25Hz
CAM_READY angle Camera physically settled at this angle
OBS CLEAR/STATIC/DYNAMIC/RECOVERING Obstacle state change only
LAYER 3 — ESP32 | Low Level | Arduino C++
Fully autonomous motion controller — RPi sends position targets only
Waypoints + leg axes stored on ESP32
Sends OBS state on every change
Active in BOTH auto and manual
Return to AUTO: ESP32 navigates to (0,0) first → sends REACHED → robot_navigator resets waypoint sequence to A → mission resumes
